required_documents: Migration Certificate (if from outside Maharashtra State Board)
Income certificate (if applying for scholarship or EBC category)
Domicile certificate (Maharashtra domicile required for state quota)
Medical fitness certificate from a registered medical practitioner
Gap certificate (if there is a gap year after 12th)
Anti-ragging undertaking (signed by student and parent)

document_submission.timing: 9 AM to 4 PM on working days
document_submission.office: Student Section, Ground Floor, Admin Block, near Main Gate

gap_certificate.required_when: If there is a gap of one or more years between 12th and admission
gap_certificate.format: Affidavit on Rs. 100 stamp paper stating reason for gap

nri_quota_documents: Passport copy of student and sponsor
Relationship proof between student and NRI sponsor
notes: All documents must be submitted in original along with 2 self-attested photocopies. Originals will be returned after verification. Keep additional copies for your own records.
document_verification_timing: 11th July to 15th July 2025 at the admission office.
